Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reconcile exhaustive async states, immutable stages, atomic commit, post-commit effects, and counts; failed, canceled, stale, and cross-tenant work must preserve the prior admitted state; then reorder one timer, Promise, claim, lease, fencing, worker, disconnect, or shutdown settlement and exclude stale effects. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.
